Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis is standing there by herself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I say to her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's nothing, really. I just needed some time to think...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to be lost in thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}After New Year's, when I had time to gather my thoughts, I realized something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}When I fought Ryoji-kun that night...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I got... really scared when my consciousness began to fade.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I was also confused and ashamed when I realized I couldn't defeat him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But I couldn't defeat him ten years ago either, and I didn't have those feelings then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I've been thinking a lot about this change that's occurred in me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}In the past, if I didn't understand something, I would just ask someone to explain it to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But ever since I decided to live for myself, no one's been able to answer the questions I've been facing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}But... there's one thing that I do understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}The reason why I wanted to be close to you was so I could monitor Death.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Even though Death is gone now, I...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I still want to be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I still don't know what it means to "live" yet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}But I want to learn the answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}And I think I can, if I'm with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So, please! Please, take me with you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I may not be strong enough, but I'll fight with everything I have![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, right. I just remembered[n]Ms. Toriumi wanted to see Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us left the rooftop together.[n]{f 1 1}
